note: Created DeviceTokenRegistrationValidationTests.cs with 10 test cases covering: valid registration, empty/null token, empty/null platform, oversized token, invalid platform values, valid platforms (ios/android), duplicate token upsert, empty body, and no body. All tests compile successfully. Tests are TDD-style — they define expected validation behavior for the POST /api/v1/device-tokens endpoint to be implemented in US-GCG-10-7.
